name: ip__sync_extension__external_source_account_id
label: External Sync Source
description: The ID of the external account that synced with this product.

name: hs_price_cad
label: Price CAD
description: Price in Canadian Dollar

name: hs_price_eur
label: Price EUR
description: Price in Euro

name: hs_price_gbp
label: Price GBP
description: Price in Pound Sterling

name: hs_price_usd
label: Price USD
description: Price in US Dollar

name: hs_product_bundle_supported_currencies
label: Product bundle supported currencies
description: Internal property used to build up hs_supported_currencies. If this is a Product bundle, then this represents the set of currencies supported by all of the associated Bundle Items

name: hs_product_supported_currencies
label: Product supported currencies
description: Internal property used to build up hs_supported_currencies. If this is a simple Product, then this represents the set of currencies supported by the pricing related properties on this Product

name: hs_supported_currencies
label: Supported currencies
description: The set of currencies supported by this Product

name: amount
label: Net price
description: Internal placeholder (to prevent conflicts with line item property of same name)

name: discount
label: Unit discount
description: The discount amount applied

name: hs_cost_of_goods_sold
label: Unit cost
description: The amount that sold goods cost the HubSpot customer

name: hs_discount_percentage
label: Discount Percentage
description: The discount percentage applied

name: hs_pricing_model
label: Pricing model
description: Defines the pricing model as either 'flat' or one of three tiered options

name: hs_tier_prices
label: Tier Prices
description: Tier prices

name: hs_tier_ranges
label: Tier Ranges
description: Tier ranges

name: price
label: Unit price
description: Cost of product

name: recurringbillingfrequency
label: Billing frequency
description: How often a product with recurring billing is billed. It informs the pricing calculation for deals and quotes. Products with one-time billing aren’t included.

name: tax
label: Tax
description: The tax amount applied

name: createdate
label: Create Date
description: The date the product was created

name: description
label: Product description
description: Full description of product

name: hs_all_accessible_team_ids
label: All teams
description: The team IDs, including the team hierarchy, of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_all_assigned_business_unit_ids
label: Business units
description: The business units this record is assigned to.

name: hs_all_owner_ids
label: All owner IDs
description: Values of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_all_team_ids
label: All team IDs
description: The team IDs of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_avatar_filemanager_key
label: Avatar FileManager key
description: The path in the FileManager CDN for this product's image. Automatically set by HubSpot.

name: hs_bundle_grouping_config_id
label: Bundle Grouping Config ID
description: ID reference to the LineItemGroupConfig that configures the grouping of line items created from this Product bundle

name: hs_bundle_type
label: Bundle type
description: Indicates the type of bundling

name: hs_created_by_user_id
label: Created by user ID
description: The user who created this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_createdate
label: Object create date/time
description: The date and time at which this object was created. This value is automatically set by HubSpot and may not be modified.

name: hs_folder
label: Folder
description: The folder containing this product

name: hs_folder_id
label: Folder Id
description: The ID of the folder that has this product

name: hs_folder_name
label: Folder name
description: Property derived from hs_folder equal to the option's label. Used to provide string-like search functionality as opposed to the enumeration search functionality of hs_folder

name: hs_images
label: Image Url
description: Product images.

name: hs_lastmodifieddate
label: Last Modified Date
description: The date any property on this product was modified

name: hs_merged_object_ids
label: Merged record IDs
description: The list of record IDs that have been merged into this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_object_id
label: Record ID
description: The unique ID for this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_object_source
label: Record creation source
description: Raw internal PropertySource present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_1
label: Record source detail 1
description: First level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_2
label: Record source detail 2
description: Second level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_3
label: Record source detail 3
description: Third level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_id
label: Record creation source ID
description: Raw internal sourceId present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_label
label: Record source
description: How this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_user_id
label: Record creation source user ID
description: Raw internal userId present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

name: hs_owning_teams
label: Owning Teams
description: The teams that are attributed to this record.

name: hs_pinned_engagement_id
label: Pinned engagement ID
description: The object ID of the current pinned engagement. This will only be shown in the app if there is already an association to the engagement.

name: hs_product_classification
label: Product Classification
description: The classification of product.Categorizes your product as either Standalone, Variant or Bundle

name: hs_product_type
label: Product type
description: The type of product. By default, categorize your product as either Inventory, Non-Inventory or Service.

name: hs_read_only
label: Read only object
description: Determines whether a record can be edited by a user.

name: hs_rich_text_description
label: Description
description: Full description of product with rich text formatting

name: hs_shared_team_ids
label: Shared teams
description: Additional teams whose users can access the record based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows or APIs.

name: hs_shared_user_ids
label: Shared users
description: Additional users that can access the record based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows and APIs.

name: hs_sku
label: SKU
description: Unique product identifier

name: hs_status
label: Status
description: Active or inactive status for a product. Determines whether or not the product will appear in search when creating a line item from a product

name: hs_tax_category
label: Tax Category
description: The tax category used to determine what amount of tax to automatically apply to line items created from this product

name: hs_unique_creation_key
label: Unique creation key
description: Unique property used for idempotent creates

name: hs_updated_by_user_id
label: Updated by user ID
description: The user who last updated this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_url
label: URL
description: Product url.

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_notification_followers
label: User IDs of all notification followers
description: The user IDs of all users that have clicked follow within the object to opt-in to getting follow notifications

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_notification_unfollowers
label: User IDs of all notification unfollowers
description: The user IDs of all object owners that have clicked unfollow within the object to opt-out of getting follow notifications

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_owners
label: User IDs of all owners
description: The user IDs of all owners of this record.

name: hs_was_imported
label: Performed in an import
description: Object is part of an import

name: hubspot_owner_assigneddate
label: Owner assigned date
description: The most recent timestamp of when an owner was assigned to this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hubspot_owner_id
label: Owner
description: The owner of the object.

name: hubspot_team_id
label: HubSpot Team
description: The primary team of the owner.

name: name
label: Name
description: Product name

name: quantity
label: Quantity
description: Internal placeholder (to prevent conflicts with line item property of same name)

name: stripe_product_id
label: Stripe Product ID
description: The unique identifier for this product in Stripe

name: stripe_product_is_active
label: Stripe Product Is Active
description: Indicates whether this product is currently active in Stripe

name: hs_recurring_billing_period
label: Term
description: Product recurring billing duration

name: hs_recurring_billing_start_date
label: Start Date
description: Recurring billing start date for a line item
